en: Thank you. Enjoy yourself, everybody.

Well, guys, let's get to some news. Today at the White House, President Trump hosted an event

-♪♪ Yeah, an hour into the event, Trump panicked

Speaking of the war, um...

Did you see this? Watch this. This is your president, and I don't want anyone worrying about the oil crisis

filled with heavy cream and salt on their runs and making butter.
